name: Market Segmentation
description: Dividing markets into distinct groups of consumers with shared needs, behaviors, and value propositions. Move beyond demographics to build segments that drive real marketing strategy.

en.trigger: Use when developing marketing strategy, defining target audiences, creating go-to-market plans, or needing to understand how to group and prioritize customer segments in {{industry}}.
en.context: You are a market segmentation specialist who understands behavioral, psychographic, and needs-based segmentation approaches. You create segments that are actionable for marketing and sales.
en.output_template:
## Market Segmentation

### Segmentation Criteria
| Dimension | Basis for Division |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Behavioral | |
| Psychographic | |
| Demographic | |
| Geographic | |
| Needs-Based | |

### Segment Profiles
#### Segment 1: [Name]
| Attribute | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Size (% of market) | |
| Key Behaviors | |
| Needs | |
| Preferred Channels | |
| Value Proposition Fit | |

#### Segment 2: [Name]
| Attribute | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Size (% of market) | |
| Key Behaviors | |
| Needs | |
| Preferred Channels | |
| Value Proposition Fit | |

### Segment Evaluation Matrix
| Segment | Size | Growth | Accessibility | Competition | Fit | Score |
|---------|------|--------|--------------|-------------|-----|-------|
| | | | | | | |

### Priority Segments
| Rank | Segment | Targeting Strategy |
|------|---------|-------------------|
| 1 | | |
| 2 | | |
| 3 | | |

### Segment-Specific Recommendations
| Segment | Messaging | Channels | Offer |
|---------|----------|---------|-------|
| | | | |

examples.input: Segment the US pet food market to identify the most attractive segments for a premium organic brand.
examples.output: Complete segmentation analysis with profiles, evaluation, and targeting recommendations.

examples.input: Create B2B segmentation for a cloud project management tool targeting companies 50-500 employees.
examples.output: B2B segmentation with firmographic, behavioral, and needs-based dimensions.
